name: the pot
identity: A large cooking vessel used to simmer a rich, gamey stew, central to the communal meal preparation.
current_status: Simmering over a smaller fire, releasing a rich, gamey scent that draws the attention of the entire camp.

appearance.value: large, presumably made of metal or clay, with a capacity to hold a substantial amount of liquid

purpose.value: cooking and simmering food, particularly for communal meals

volatile_state.location: by a smaller fire, within the camp
